mission.title: argo: RBAC should include separate permissions for deleting k8s resources
mission.description: RBAC should include separate permissions for deleting k8s resources. This issue affects 92+ users.

steps.title: Identify argo troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your argo deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo -n argo --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review argo configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get configmap -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo
```
I'd like to be able to give delete permissions that are more granular than the application level. Ideally, I'd like to be able to enable them for specific resource types, such as Pods, or any other resource that is owned by a resource ArgoCD created.

steps.title: Apply the fix for RBAC should include separate permissions for deleting k8s
steps.description:
Task to do
```yaml
p, role:staging-db-admins, applications, delete, staging-db-admins/*/apps/Deployment, allow
p, role:staging-db-admins, applications, delete, staging-db-admins/*/Pods, allow
```

steps.title: Confirm RBAC should include separate permissions for is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo -n argo --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n argo --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: See the linked issue and PR for the community-verified solution.
codeSnippets:
p, role:staging-db-admins, applications, delete, staging-db-admins/*/apps/Deployment, allow
p, role:staging-db-admins, applications, delete, staging-db-admins/*/Pods, allow

p, role:developer, applications, delete, */*, deny
p, role:developer, applications, delete, <appproject>/<app>, defer
i, role:developer, group, pod-deleters
i, role:developer, group, config-deleters
i, role:developer, group, deployment-deleters
...

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo installed or the issue environment reproducible.
